ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant type */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the grant was awarded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the research is being conducted */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution associated with the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on-hold) */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the project */,
  "expected_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("principal_investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_grant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_type_id") REFERENCES grant_types ("grant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_types" (
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant type */,
  "grant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the grant */,
  "funding_amount_range" TEXT /* Range of funding amounts for the grant */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the grant */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Evaluation criteria for the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the principal investigator */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the principal investigator (e.g., PhD, MD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Actual expenditure */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the funding */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., lump sum, installment) */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date of disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for the milestone */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., completed, pending, on-hold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the outcome */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Evaluation criteria for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., publication, presentation) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the output */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., grant administrator, researcher, principal investigator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team_members" (
  "project_team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reviews" (
  "grant_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
